items.title: LIVE: Christmas Eve Mass at St. Patrick's Cathedral in New York
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Thousands gather at St. Patrick's Cathedral in New York for Christmas Eve Mass.

#christmas #christmaseve 
Credit: St Patrick’s Cathedral

items.title: Stunning videos show Hawaii's Kilauea volcano erupting
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
One of the world's most active volcanoes spewed lava into the air for a second straight day on Tuesday. The eruption of Kilauea volcano on Hawaii's Big Island has stayed within the mountain's summit caldera inside Hawaii Volcanoes National Park, with no homes threatened.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

items.title: LIVE: Germany mourns Christmas market attack victims in Magdeburg
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Mourners lay flowers and light candles near the scene of the deadly Christmas market attack in Magdeburg, Germany. Five people were killed, including a 9-year-old boy, and more than 200 injured when a man drove a car into the busy market on Friday evening. Read more here: https://bit.ly/41K16qf

#germany #magdeburg #live

items.title: As high surf and flooding threats persist, Santa Cruz mayor assess long-term solutions
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Persistent high surf and flooding threats along California’s coast had residents on high alert a day after the partial collapse of a pier, which propelled three people into the Pacific Ocean. Santa Cruz Mayor Fred Keeley say officials will have to assess long-term solutions for protecting the coastal city from the impacts of climate change. (AP Video: Nic Coury)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home

items.title: Gangs in Haiti attack journalists covering the attempted reopening of the country's main hospital
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Suspected gang members opened fire on journalists in Haiti's capital on Tuesday as they covered the attempted reopening of the country's largest hospital, according to a local radio station. 

(AP Video shot by Mickenson Duvergé)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Santa Tracker 2024 LIVE: Watch NORAD follow Santa
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
The annual NORAD Tracks Santa program is a decades-long Christmas-themed initiative by the North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD) that simulates tracking Santa Claus as he leaves the North Pole to deliver gifts to children around the world on Christmas Eve. Read more: https://bit.ly/4gwe7Is

#norad #santaclaus #santatracker #christmas #northpole #news

items.title: Netflix tackles NFL and Beyoncé: Is its tech ready?
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Netflix is betting big on Christmas Day with NFL games and a Beyoncé halftime show. But after streaming issues last month, the real win will be delivering a glitch-free holiday experience.
#netflix #beyonce #shorts

items.title: Sailors greeted with tears and cheers as USS Cole returns to home port ahead of Christmas
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Hundreds of sailors and their loved ones got an early Christmas present when the USS Cole docked at its home port in Norfolk, Virginia after seven months at sea.

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Talks to reach a deal between Hamas and Israel continue, the Qatari Foreign Ministry spokesperson said during a press conference in Doha on Tuesday (AP video shot by Najib Jobain).

items.title: LIVE: Pope Francis leads Christmas Eve Mass with opening of Holy Door at the Vatican
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Pope Francis presides over Christmas Eve Mass at the Vatican, beginning with the opening of the Holy Door.

#popefrancis #christmas #christmaseve #vatican #news

items.title: LIVE: View from Bethlehem on Christmas Eve
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Live from the city of Bethlehem in the Israeli-occupied West Bank, the traditional birthplace of Jesus, on Christmas Eve. For the second straight year, Bethlehem’s Christmas celebrations will be somber and muted, in deference to ongoing war in Gaza. Read more here: https://bit.ly/49UAhS3

#bethlehem #christmas #live

items.title: What to know about the death of a woman who was set on fire in a New York subway
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
New York City police have arrested a man on murder and arson charges in the death of a woman who was set on fire inside a subway train early Sunday morning. 

#news #newyork #subway #transit #crime
